headline: A Look At Interactive Brokers Group (IBKR) Valuation After Strong Multi Year Total Returns
summary: Why Interactive Brokers Group (IBKR) Is Back on Investors’ Radar Interactive Brokers Group (IBKR) has drawn fresh attention after a period of strong multi year total returns. This has put its current valuation and business fundamentals in sharper focus for investors comparing brokerage stocks. The stock’s reported total returns over the past year, past 3 months and five year period, alongside revenue of US$6.45b and net income of US$1.04b, provide several concrete data points investors can...

headline: Buy These 3 Investment Bank Stocks From a Promising Industry
summary: Efforts to boost operating efficiency, solid trading performance and momentum in underwriting and advisory businesses are likely to support Zacks Investment Bank industry players, like Morgan Stanley, Schwab and Interactive Brokers.

headline: IBKR (NASDAQ:IBKR) Hits Technical Breakout Screen with Perfect 10 Rating and Strong Setup Score
summary: IBKR scores a perfect Technical Rating of 10 and a Setup Quality of 8, identifying it as a strong breakout candidate with a defined entry point near $88.73.

headline: Interactive Brokers Launches Commission-Free iShares ETFs from BlackRock through Recurring Investment Feature Across Europe
